title: amygdalus eocenica
intro: Amygdalus eocenica is an extinct species of flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is an ancient relative of modern apricot and plum trees. The medicinal properties of Amygdalus eocenica are thought to be similar to those of its modern relatives, with potential health benefits including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Although there is limited information available on the specific herbal preparations of Amygdalus eocenica, it is likely that it could be used to make teas, tinctures, and other infusions with potential health benefits similar to those of its modern relatives.
